approve(address,address,address,uint256).details: Spender must have a controller in controller facade

borrow(address,address,uint256).details: Specified token must have a LP Account must remain healthy after the borrow, otherwise tx is reverted Emits Borrow(account, msg.sender, token, amount) event

closeAccount(address).details: Account can only be closed when the account has no debt Emits AccountClosed(account, owner) event

params._account: Address of account to be closed

deposit(address,address,uint256).details: Token must be accepted as collateral by the protocol

exec(address,address[],uint256,bytes[]).details: Target must have a controller in controller facade

params.amt: Amount of Eth to send to the target contract
params.data: Encoded sig + params of the function to transact with in the target contract
params.target: Address of contract to transact with

liquidate(address).details: Account can only be liquidated when it's unhealthy Emits AccountLiquidated(account, owner) event

openAccount(address).details: Creates a new account if there are no inactive accounts otherwise reuses an already inactive account Emits AccountAssigned(account, owner) event

params.owner: Owner of the newly opened account

repay(address,address,uint256).details: Specified token must have a LP Emits Repay(account, msg.sender, token, amount) event

withdraw(address,address,uint256).details: Amount of token can only be withdrawn if the account remains healthy after withdrawal

withdrawEth(address,uint256).details: Eth can only be withdrawn if the account remains healthy after withdrawal

approve(address,address,address,uint256).notice: Gives a spender approval to spend a given amount of token from the account

assetCap().notice: Number of assets a Vanna account can hold - 1

borrow(address,address,uint256).notice: Transfers a specified amount of token from the LP to the account

closeAccount(address).notice: Closes a specified account for a user

deposit(address,address,uint256).notice: Transfers a specified amount of token from the owner to the account

depositEth(address).notice: Transfers Eth from owner to account

exec(address,address[],uint256,bytes[]).notice: A general function that allows the owner to perform specific interactions with external protocols for their account

getInactiveAccountsOf(address).notice: Fetches inactive accounts of a user

inactiveAccountsOf(address,uint256).notice: List of inactive accounts per user

openAccount(address).notice: Opens a new account for a user

repay(address,address,uint256).notice: Transfers a specified amount of token from the account to the LP

settle(address).notice: Settles an account by repaying all the loans

toggleCollateralStatus(address).notice: Toggle collateral status of a token

withdraw(address,address,uint256).notice: Transfers a specified amount of token from the account to the owner of the account

withdrawEth(address,uint256).notice: Transfers Eth from the account to owner
